market_pulse: Strong competitive activity across major Vegas nightclubs heading into the weekend. OMNIA leading the charge with multi-day lineup (DJ Pauly D, Fisher, Latin Sundays). Hakkasan emphasizing R&B/house fusion mid-week. XS and Zouk both feature major electronic talent (SOFI TUKKER, RL Grime). Omnia Beach Club preparing for imminent May 15 opening with significant pre-launch buzz.

venues.summary: R&Bae Wednesdays tonight with DJ Franzen; Laidback Luke takes over Thursday. Strong mid-week programming driving traffic.

raw_posts.content_summary: R&Bae Wednesdays w/ DJ Franzen. Wednesday, April 8, 2026 10:30 PM - Thursday, April 9, 2026 4:00 AM. R&B-focused event at Hakkasan inside MGM Grand.
Laidback Luke confirmed for Thursday night at Hakkasan. Thursday, April 9, 2026 10:30 PM - Friday, April 10, 2026 4:00 AM. House/electronic set.

venues.summary: Strong weekend lineup: DJ Pauly D (Thu 4/9), Fisher (Fri 4/10), DESEO: Latin Sundays (Sat 4/11). High-caliber talent rotation maintaining market presence.

raw_posts.content_summary: DJ Pauly D confirmed for Thursday, April 9th, 2026. Part of OMNIA's regular Thursday night rotation. Electronic/dance music.
Fisher headlining Friday, April 10th, 2026. Fisher is a major electronic artist with strong Vegas draw. Expected high attendance.
DESEO: Latin Sundays returning Saturday, April 11th, 2026. Recurring Latin/reggaeton-focused event. Strong weekend closer.

venues.summary: SOFI TUKKER confirmed for April 10-11 weekend. Electronic dance duo bringing mainstream appeal to Wynn venue.

raw_posts.content_summary: SOFI TUKKER performing April 10-11, 2026 at XS inside Wynn Las Vegas. Known for high-energy electronic sets and strong fan base.

venues.summary: RL Grime scheduled for April 10 AND April 24, 2026. Dual-date booking shows strong demand and competitive positioning at Resorts World.

raw_posts.content_summary: RL Grime at Zouk Nightclub, Friday, April 10, 2026, 10:30 PM. Major electronic/trap artist driving ticket sales.
RL Grime return booking confirmed for Friday, April 24, 2026, 10:30 PM. Secondary date indicates strong sell-through on first show.

venues.summary: No recent social media posts captured in last 8 hours. Seasonal daytime venue; minimal activity at this hour expected.
Major announcement: Omnia Beach Club opens May 15, 2026 at Caesars Palace. 46,000 sq ft venue with significant pre-launch marketing underway.

raw_posts.content_summary: Omnia Dayclub & Skybar opening announcement for May 15, 2026. 46,000 square foot Roman palace-inspired venue at Caesars Palace. Major seasonal dayclub launch with world-class DJ lineup (Rufus du Sol, Martin Garrix, Justin Mylo confirmed).
